data.description: Federal Reserve Board announces that it is seeking individuals to serve on its Insurance Policy Advisory Committee

data.title: Petcurean launching Now Fresh Good Gravy™ line at SUPERZOO 2025 with beef recipes for dogs and cats.
data.description: Petcurean, a renowned pet food manufacturer, has introduced a new line of Now Fresh Good Gravy™ recipes for adult cats and two beef options for dogs. This marks the first instance of beef being included in a dry food recipe by Petcurean. The launch of these products will be unveiled at the upcoming SUPERZOO event in Las Vegas from August 13-15, 2025. Petcurean is known for its premium pet food brands including Go! Solutions®, Now Fresh®, Gather™, and Summit™.  The company is eager to expand its offerings and cater to a wider range of pet preferences.

data.title: CMS Energy declares dividend of 4.200% on Series C preferred stock, payable Oct. 15, 2025 to shareholders of record.
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan on August 7, 2025, the Board of Directors of CMS Energy announced a dividend for the 4.200% Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series C. The dividend will be payable on October 15, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such at the close of business on a date yet to be specified.

data.title: BlackRock expected to file for XRP and Solana ETFs by October per expert. SEC's approval of in-kind creation noted. Retail investors unaware.
data.description: Nate Geraci, the president of NovaDius Wealth Management, discussed the latest updates regarding cryptocurrency ETFs. He mentioned that BlackRock is anticipated to submit filings for spot XRP and Solana ETFs in October. Geraci highlighted the significance of the SEC's recent approval of in-kind creation and redemption mechanisms for crypto ETFs, which improves efficiency and lowers costs. Despite this regulatory shift, approved ETFs like Grayscale and Bitwise are facing delays, potentially impacted by internal SEC dynamics, notably resistance from Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw. Geraci shared his insights during an interview on the Thinking Crypto podcast, where he elaborated on these developments. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Richmond American to debut Great Basin at Olympia in Herriman on Aug. 23; Grand Opening event announced.
data.description: The new housing development, Great Basin at Olympia, is set to have its Grand Opening event on Saturday, August 23 in Herriman, Utah. The project is being undertaken by Richmond American Homes of Utah, Inc., a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc. This signifies a major milestone for the development, showcasing the growing interest in the area. Residents and interested buyers can visit the site to learn more about the available homes and community features. The event is set to attract a large crowd, with significant numbers expected to attend.

data.title: Extend your summer getaway at Inns of Monterey for discounts as late summer savings kick in.
data.description: Enjoy significant savings by extending your stay in Monterey as summer draws to a close in 2025. With ideal weather conditions including sunny skies, gentle breezes, and flourishing landscapes, late summer offers the perfect opportunity to visit the peninsula. Additionally, the onset of the back-to-school season results in decreased tourist crowds, further enhancing the overall experience. Make the most of this time and save big while exploring Monterey's beauty.

data.title: Data breach at Precision Endodontics of Raleigh: email account accessed on June 10, 2025; phishing emails sent to small part of contact list.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, the dental clinic Precision Endodontics recently found out on June 10, 2025, that its email system was breached by an unidentified individual. This breach led to phishing emails being sent to a fraction of its former contacts. Furthermore, the compromised contact list contained names of approximately [insert number] individuals.

data.title: Nuvia Dental Implant Center to open 7 new locations across the US in second half of 2025, including Harrison, NY in September.
data.description: In August 7, 2025, in Salt Lake City, the Nuvia Dental Implant Center announced plans to enhance availability of its complete arch dental implant procedure by launching seven additional facilities throughout the United States in the latter part of 2025. These new locations are set to open in various cities such as Harrison, NY in September, increasing the total reach of the dental implant treatment offered.

data.title: Analysts predict 'billions' to flow into Bitcoin, Ethereum due to Trump's 401K order.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% this year, higher than the initial forecast of 4.9%. This growth is largely attributed to the rapid recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic, with various industries showing significant improvement. In particular, the manufacturing sector is expected to expand by 7.8%, while the services sector is forecasted to grow by 5.1%. Additionally, global trade is expected to increase by 9.7% this year. The report also mentions that inflation rates are on the rise, with an estimated global average of 3.2% for this year. Overall, the outlook for the global economy appears to be positive, with strong growth expected in various sectors.

data.title: One Equity Partners to invest in Brown & Root Industrial Services, agreement reached in New York.
data.description: In New York, private equity firm One Equity Partners recently announced their plan to invest in Brown & Root Industrial Services. This agreement signifies a significant move in the industrial services sector, with the deal set to inject a substantial amount of funding into the company. While specific numbers were not disclosed, the investment is expected to have a notable impact on Brown & Root Industrial Services' operations and growth trajectory.

data.title: CCIAP announced 5 trade shows for 2026 to take place from March 10–12 at Panama Convention Center, boosting regional growth.
data.description: In Panama City on August 7, 2025, the Chamber of Commerce, Industries, and Agriculture of Panama (CCIAP) declared its lineup of five upcoming international trade exhibitions for 2026. The shows are set to occur from March 10–12 at the Panama Convention Center. These specialized events will offer a platform for showcasing various industries and fostering global business connections.

data.title: Oak Valley Community Bank hired Matthew Brown as VP, Commercial Banking Officer for upcoming Lodi Branch.
data.description: Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), based in Oakdale, Calif., recently welcomed Matthew Brown as Vice President, Commercial Banking Officer. Brown will work at the new Lodi Branch at 31 South School Street, set to open this autumn.

data.title: New pill in trial by Eli Lilly results in significant weight loss. Company aims for FDA approval by year-end for orforglipron.
data.description: The company announced its intention to pursue FDA approval for its drug, orforglipron, by the year's end.
